rules.name: collector.issue.permission
rules.title: Collector blocked by missing permission
rules.description: The collector could not read the requested surface with the current auth context.

rules.name: collector.issue.service
rules.title: Collector blocked by service condition
rules.description: The surface is unavailable, not enabled, or not found in this tenant context.

rules.name: sharepoint.broad_link
rules.title: Broad SharePoint or OneDrive sharing link
rules.description: A site exposes organization-wide or anonymous access through a broad sharing link.

rules.name: app_consent.high_privilege
rules.title: High privilege or weakly owned enterprise application consent
rules.description: An enterprise app has risky scopes or insufficient ownership.

rules.name: response.blocked
rules.title: Guarded response action blocked
rules.description: A response action failed prerequisite checks or the command plan hit a blocker.
